title: Bodega Startup Fixes, Model Unload on Exit, Response Templates, --deep N for Ask

test_results.note: 1 pre-existing env-dependent failure (daemon running during test) excluded from count

A.title: Bodega Startup Wait Loop Fix
A.root_cause: health() called raise_for_status() on HTTP 503 before parsing JSON body. vLLM returns 503 with {"status":"unhealthy"} when no models loaded. This was converted to {"status":"error"}, causing wait_for_server() to loop forever and pre_flight() to set bodega_reachable=False.
fix: bodega_inference.py: health() now parses JSON body before raise_for_status(). If body has valid 'status' key (e.g. 'unhealthy'), returns it as-is instead of raising.
bodega_router.py: wait_for_server() returns immediately on 'unhealthy' status (server reachable, no models loaded).
orchestrator.py: pre_flight() treats any valid HTTP status as bodega_reachable=True. Checks model_info.get('loaded') explicitly for model state.

B.title: Model Unload on Exit Fix
B.root_cause: Cleanup was gated on _chat_mode being True. Because health() returned error for 503, pre_flight set bodega_reachable=False, prepare_for_chat was never called, _chat_mode was never set, and cleanup was skipped on exit — leaving the 37b model loaded.
B.fix: Cleanup now unconditionally queries list_models() and unloads ALL loaded models, not gated on _chat_mode.

C.title: Health Display & Ask Error Messages
C.audit: All 10 callers of .health() audited — 8 safe, 2 display issues fixed.
changes: health.py: Shows '🟡 online (no models loaded)' instead of '✅ running' when status is 'unhealthy'.
ask.py: --recall mode says 'no models loaded' instead of 'offline' when status is 'unhealthy'.

D.title: Control Token Leak Fix in Compare
D.root_cause: <|im_end|> control tokens were leaking into compare output and breaking finance template recognition in decomposer.
D.fix: Added re.sub(r'<\|[^|]*\|>', '', report).strip() after think-block stripping in both REASON and MID fallback paths.

E.title: Response Template System
E.description: User-customizable output format templates. Plain .txt files in ~/.octane/templates/ with natural-language instructions appended to synthesis system prompts under '=== User Response Format ===' heading.

cli_commands.octane pref template: List all template slots with status (custom/default). With slot name, shows current template content.
cli_commands.octane pref template-set <name> \"instru: Write custom template. Validates against known slot names.
cli_commands.octane pref template-reset [name]: Delete custom template (reverts to default). No arg = reset all.

api.load_template(name): Reads ~/.octane/templates/{name}.txt, returns content or None. Cached in-process.
api.apply_template(system_prompt, name): Appends loaded template to system prompt. Prints notice to stderr when custom template active.
api.clear_cache(): Clears in-process template cache for immediate pickup after edits.

F.title: --deep N Dimensions for octane ask
F.description: Changed --deep from bool flag to str|None supporting round count. 'octane ask "query" --deep 20' runs 20 deepening rounds (clamped 1-10). Default without number: 8 rounds. Applies to both search and news sub-agents.
changes: ask.py: --deep changed from bool to str|None using parse_deep_flag(). deep_rounds flows through extra_metadata to web agent.
agent.py execute(): Extracts deep_rounds from request.metadata, defaults to 3.
agent.py _fetch_news(): Uses deep_rounds for r2_rounds count (max 1, min deep_rounds 10).
agent.py _fetch_search(): Converted single if-block to multi-round loop using deep_rounds. Each round calls generate_followups, searches, extracts, accumulates results.
test_session22_deepening.py: Updated 3 tests to match new signatures (deep_rounds param, assert counts).
usage_examples: octane ask 'why is the sky blue' --deep        → 8 rounds
octane ask 'why is the sky blue' --deep 20     → 10 rounds (clamped)
octane ask 'why is the sky blue' --deep 2      → 2 rounds
octane ask 'why is the sky blue'               → no deepening
